string 2: ...Wake up.

Once you're ready, begin your investigation anew.
I have faith in you.

A Backdoor Key is required in order to proceed beyond this
point.
The Backdoor Key has been verified.

I sense a presence from beyond the door. 
I believe it to be our ally Omnimon Zwart.

Then you-know-who must be up ahead, too. I hope he's okay...
Wait, why should I even be worried about him?!

I ought to give him a piece of my mind!
Come on, let's head through the door. Are you ready?
Let's head on through the door. Are you ready?
{next}I'm ready.
{end}I need a little more time.

...I'm glad we followed him.
I was reminded of feelings I had long forgotten.

So this is what it feels like to trust someone... to share
a bond with them... I must say, it isn't half bad.

After meeting you guys, I, too, want to believe in 
the bond that exists between humans and Digimon!

I'll be waiting here. I can't leave him...
I can't leave my dad's side.
They're fast asleep...

You can use this to return to the In-Between Theater.
However, all of your progress up to this point will be lost.
{end}[Continue investigating.]
[Quit.]

There's no end to them!
We should leave this room and try to regroup.

They won't respond.
It's like they can't even see you.

Here. I want you to take this, in my place.
I hope it proves useful...

We can't afford to waste any time here. Our partners will be
absorbed by Parallelmon if we don't move quickly.

It looks like they are about to attack... 
Is Parallelmon behind this?

This is gonna end up taking even more of our precious time...!
We need to reach Parallelmon before our partners are absorbed!

The battle ahead is gonna be fierce. 
You ready for this?
{next}Yes. Let's go defeat Parallelmon!
{end}I need some more time.
